Read the ./internal/github_copilot_sdk_challenge_guidelines.md and evaluate 
the current repository very thoroughly against the rules in the document.
Provide a score based on the evaluation and a detailed explanation of the score, 
including any areas where the repository excels or falls short according to the guidelines.

Provide suggestions and actionable feedback on how to improve the repository 
to better align with the guidelines and increase the score. Provide a least one
actionable feedback about how the repository could go above and beyond the guidelines 
to create an exceptional repository that stands out in the competition.
